calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Seal Exhibit B Of The Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PACE SUPPLY CORPORATION'S Motion To Seal Exhibit B Of The Complaint.

Pace's motion to seal is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown per CRC 2.550 et seq.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
